function_v0.doc: Forward the contract's full balance of `asset` to the destination.\n`asset` is the SAC contract address of the token to forward.\nAnyone can call this \xe2\x80\x94 the contract simply sends whatever it holds.
function_v0.name: forward

function_v0.doc: Convenience: forward a specific amount instead of the full balance.
function_v0.name: forward_amount
